title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at ACC Limited Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at ACC Limited Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
ACC Limited Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ACC Limited Advisory Limited:
ACC Limited Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited Advisory Limited!
